heading: Recruiting functions: provision of meals and refreshments
label: 520c Recruiting functions: provision of meals and refreshments
notes: Amendments2003— substituted “provision of meals and refreshments” for “use of funds” in section catchline, struck out “(a) .—” before “Under regulations”, and struck out heading and text of subsec. (b). Text read as follows: “Not later than February 1 of each of the years 1998 through 2002, the Secretary of Defense shall submit to Congress a report on the extent to which the authority under subsection (a) was exercised during the fiscal year ending in the preceding year.”Pub. L. 108–136Provision of Meals and Refreshments2001—Subsec. (a)(4). , substituted “recruiting functions” for “recruiting events”.Pub. L. 107–107, § 545(b)(1)Subsec. (a)(5). , substituted “presence at recruiting functions” for “presence at recruiting efforts”.Pub. L. 107–107, § 545(b)(2)Subsec. (c). , struck out heading and text of subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “The authority in subsection (a) may not be exercised after .”Pub. L. 107–107, § 545(a)September 30, 2001

children.text: Persons who have enlisted under the Delayed Entry Program authorized by .section 513 of this title
Persons who are objects of armed forces recruiting efforts.
Persons whose assistance in recruiting efforts of the military departments is determined to be influential by the Secretary concerned.
Members of the armed forces and Federal employees when attending recruiting functions in accordance with a requirement to do so.
Other persons whose presence at recruiting functions will contribute to recruiting efforts.
